The '''''Carsunum Chariot''''' was a [[wind catamaran]]—a special type of [[wind rider]]—owned by [[Spice lord|Spice Lord]] [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Trevael]]. It was sleek [[Color/Legends|black]] and named after the [[Carsunum/Legends|carsunum]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]] that was found deep within her mountain lands. She would use the ''Carsunum Chariot'' when she participated in the various wind races that were held on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sevarcos II]].
